title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.270 - What property exempt from attachment for rent
text:
441.270.  What property exempt from attachment for rent. — Property exempt from execution shall be also exempt from attachment for rent, except the crop grown on the demised premises on which the rent claimed is due.
(RSMo 1939 § 2992) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2605; 1919 § 6899; 1909 § 7902 
Exemptions from execution, Chap. 513
